Vanguard Kids Academy

Vanguard Kids Academy is a childcare, preschool, daycare, and early education provider with campuses in Dover, Florida and Fort Myers, Florida.

Locations:
- Dover campus: 12660 Sydney Rd, Dover, FL 33527. Phone: (813) 530-0032. Hours: Monday-Friday, 6:30 am - 6:00 pm.
- Fort Myers campus: 465 Carolina Ave, Fort Myers, FL 33905. Phone: (239) 694-5912. Hours: Monday-Friday, 6:00 am - 6:00 pm.

Age range:
- Vanguard Kids Academy serves children from 6 weeks to 12 years.

Programs:
- Free VPK: Florida Voluntary Prekindergarten for eligible 4-year-olds.
- School Readiness: childcare assistance for eligible Florida families.
- Early Head Start: early care and learning support for eligible infants, toddlers, and families. Early Head Start information is tied to the Dover campus; Fort Myers should not be described as an Early Head Start location.

Campus-specific services:
- Dover: infant care, toddler care, preschool, Free VPK, School Readiness, Early Head Start information, After-School Care, Free Meals, and school pickup from Dover Elementary.
- Fort Myers: infant care, toddler care, preschool, Free VPK, School Readiness, Before & After School care, Free Meals, and pickup from Manatee Elementary, Orange River Elementary School, Tice Elementary, Oak Hammock Middle School, and James Stephens Elementary.

How to schedule a tour or apply:
- Parents can use the Apply page to request next steps or schedule a tour.
- Parents can also call the Dover or Fort Myers campus directly to confirm availability, program fit, and enrollment details.

Important website routes:
- / - homepage
- /services - childcare services, campus-specific school-age care, free meals, and school pickup
- /programs - overview of Free VPK, School Readiness, and Early Head Start
- /programs/vpk - Free VPK details
- /locations/dover - Dover campus details
- /locations/fort-myers - Fort Myers campus details
- /resources - financial assistance and program resources
- /faq - frequently asked questions
- /apply - tour and enrollment next steps
- /privacy - privacy policy

Lead form:
- The enrollment popup submits directly to Formspree at https://formspree.io/f/mykqyree and is compatible with static hosting.

Details such as availability, eligibility, hours, and program participation may change. Parents should contact the campus directly to confirm current information.
